prerequisites: A Watchmode account, created for free on the Watchmode Developer plan at https://api.watchmode.com/requestApiKey/ (the Developer plan provides 2,500 free monthly requests for non-commercial use; no credit card is required).
An API key issued to your Watchmode account, available after registration.
A value for the required search_val config field (the term Watchmode searches against).
A value for the required start_date config field, marking the point from which to begin pulling records.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Watchmode uses a per-account API key. Supply it in the connector's api_key field; the key is sent as the apiKey query parameter on every request to the Watchmode API. Obtain the key by registering a free account on the Watchmode Developer plan.

setupSteps.title: Create a Watchmode account and request an API key
setupSteps.body: Go to https://api.watchmode.com/requestApiKey/ and register for the free Developer plan using an email address and a password (at least 6 characters with 1 letter and 1 number). The free plan grants 2,500 monthly requests and lets you choose up to 3 countries for streaming-availability access. After agreeing to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, your API key becomes available to your account.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key from your Watchmode account into the connector's api_key field. The connector sends it as the apiKey query parameter on each request to the Watchmode API, so no separate sign-in is required.

setupSteps.title: Set the required configuration fields
setupSteps.body: Set search_val to the value you want Watchmode to search against. Set start_date to the date from which the sync should begin pulling records. Both fields are required.
